title: canthium horridum var. xanthocaulon
intro: Canthium horridum var. xanthocaulon is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the yellow-stemmed canthium. Traditionally, this plant is used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Canthium horridum var. xanthocaulon include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. The plant is prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and topical applications.
